ext_desc.message: Upload files to QURL and insert secure access links into Gmail compose drafts.

subtitle.message: Upload files to QURL and insert links

settings_label.description: Accessible label and tooltip for the settings button

settings_close_label.description: Accessible label and tooltip for closing the settings panel

config_label.description: Label for the QURL server configuration area

config_placeholder.description: Placeholder text for the QURL server URL input

config_default_hint.message: Leave this blank to use the built-in default server.
config_default_hint.description: Hint shown when the default server is active

config_custom_active.description: Hint shown when a custom server override is active

config_custom_saved.description: Success hint shown after saving a custom server URL

config_save_error.message: Failed to save QURL server URL.
config_save_error.description: Fallback error shown when saving the server URL fails

config_invalid_url_error.message: QURL server URL must be a valid http(s) URL.
config_invalid_url_error.description: Shown when the configured QURL server URL cannot be parsed

config_https_required_error.message: QURL server URL must start with https://
config_https_required_error.description: Shown when the configured QURL server URL is not HTTPS

api_invalid_json_error.description: Shown when the QURL server responds with invalid JSON

api_invalid_payload_error.description: Shown when the QURL server responds with an unexpected JSON shape

config_reset_error.message: Failed to reset QURL server URL.
config_reset_error.description: Fallback error shown when resetting the server URL fails

save_config_btn.description: Button label for saving the configured QURL server URL

reset_config_btn.description: Button label for clearing the configured QURL server URL

select_label.description: Label for the file selection section

browse_btn.description: Button text to open file picker

file_remove_label.description: Accessible label for removing a selected file

no_file_selected.description: Placeholder text when no file is selected

unnamed_file.description: Fallback label when an uploaded file does not have a name

inserting_hint.message: Upload complete. Inserting links into Gmail...
inserting_hint.description: Footer hint shown while the extension is waiting to insert links into Gmail

copy_btn.description: Copy the same formatted content that is inserted into Gmail

footer_hint.message: Make sure a Gmail compose window is open.

result_one_error.description: Error summary for single failed file

result_n_errors.description: Error summary for multiple failed files

result_insertion_only_failed.message: Uploaded successfully, but Gmail draft insertion failed
result_insertion_only_failed.description: Error summary shown when uploads succeed but Gmail insertion fails

permission_missing_error.message: Permission to access the configured QURL server is missing. Open settings and save the server URL again.
permission_missing_error.description: Shown when the configured QURL server origin is no longer granted

permission_request_denied_error.message: Permission to access this QURL server was not granted.
permission_request_denied_error.description: Shown when the user declines the permission prompt for a custom QURL server

permission_request_confirm.message: Allow the extension to access $1 for QURL uploads? Chrome will show a permission prompt next.
permission_request_confirm.description: Confirmation shown before requesting host permission for a custom QURL server

permission_request_cancelled.message: Custom server access request was canceled.
permission_request_cancelled.description: Shown when the user cancels the pre-permission confirmation for a custom QURL server

permission_request_continue.description: Button label for proceeding with a custom-server permission request

permission_request_cancel.description: Button label for canceling a custom-server permission request

active_tab_not_gmail_error.message: Active tab is not Gmail. Please switch to an open Gmail compose tab.
active_tab_not_gmail_error.description: Shown when the popup tries to insert links while the active tab is not Gmail

no_active_tab_error.description: Shown when Chrome does not report an active tab for the current window

no_response_from_content_script.description: Shown when the Gmail content script does not return a result after receiving an insert request

gmail_response_timeout.message: Timed out while waiting for the Gmail tab to respond.
gmail_response_timeout.description: Shown when the popup waits too long for the background or Gmail tab response

gmail_insert_failed.message: Failed to insert links into the Gmail draft.
gmail_insert_failed.description: Fallback error shown when Gmail link insertion fails without a more specific reason

compose_body_missing_error.message: QURL: Could not find compose window. Please open a compose window and try again.
compose_body_missing_error.description: Toast shown inside Gmail when no visible compose body can be found

compose_insert_failed_notification.message: QURL: Failed to insert links. Please copy them manually from the popup.
compose_insert_failed_notification.description: Toast shown inside Gmail when all compose insertion strategies fail

runtime_message_failed.description: Fallback error shown when the popup cannot contact the background worker at all

upload_timeout_error.description: Shown when a file upload exceeds the configured request timeout

compose_insert_timeout_error.message: Timed out while waiting to insert links into Gmail.
compose_insert_timeout_error.description: Shown when the Gmail insertion request remains pending for too long

expiry_suffix.description: Suffix shown after a link when the server returns an expiry timestamp
